description: Grid-coordinate-derived substitution keys on 73-char column mask extract. 150+ key derivation functions from (row, col) grid coordinates + exhaustive affine fit.
key_finding: Max 5/24 across 3,726 configs. Required Vigenere keystream at crib positions (BLZCDCYYGCKAZ, MUYKLGKORNA) is completely irregular — no coordinate-based pattern fits. Affine fit key=a*col+b*row+c (17,576 combos): insufficient to discriminate. Key is NOT a simple function of grid position.
